channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Yellowstone supervolcano may be powered by unexpected source
item.description: Scientists propose a new explanation for Yellowstone and other supervolcanoes, challenging the idea of a deep mantle plume.

item.title: Rare supernova reveals hidden layers of a dying star
item.description: Astronomers studying SN 2021yfj discovered material from deep within a dying star, offering a rare glimpse into its history.

item.title: Hawaii turns ocean plastic and fishing nets into road materials
item.description: Researchers in Hawaii are repurposing old fishing nets and recycled plastic by mixing them into asphalt. Early tests show promising results.

item.title: Scientists identify what triggers belly fat with aging
item.description: Aging may activate specialized stem cells that boost belly fat production. This finding reveals a significant mechanism behind age-related weight gain.
